timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: First Zionist Congress convenes
description: Delegates meet in Basel to organize the modern Zionist movement and promote a Jewish homeland in Palestine.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: Britain issues the Balfour Declaration
description: The British government announces support for the establishment of a national home for the Jewish people in Palestine.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: League of Nations approves the Mandate for Palestine
description: The mandate formalizes British administration of Palestine and incorporates support for a Jewish national home.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: Arab Revolt begins in Palestine
description: A large-scale Arab uprising breaks out against British rule and growing Jewish immigration.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: UN adopts the partition plan
description: The United Nations recommends partitioning Palestine into separate Arab and Jewish states with a special regime for Jerusalem.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: State of Israel is proclaimed
description: David Ben-Gurion declares the establishment of Israel as the British Mandate comes to an end.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: First Arab-Israeli War begins
description: Armies from neighboring Arab states invade after Israel's declaration of independence, widening the conflict into a regional war.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: Armistice agreements end the 1948 war
description: Israel signs armistice agreements with Egypt, Lebanon, Jordan, and Syria, establishing new ceasefire lines.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: Suez Crisis erupts
description: Israel attacks Egypt in coordination with Britain and France after the nationalization of the Suez Canal.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: Palestine Liberation Organization is founded
description: The PLO is established to represent Palestinian national aspirations and coordinate political and military action.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: Six-Day War begins
description: Israel launches preemptive strikes and defeats Egypt, Jordan, and Syria, capturing the West Bank, Gaza Strip, East Jerusalem, Sinai, and the Golan Heights.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: Yom Kippur War begins
description: Egypt and Syria launch a surprise attack on Israeli positions on Yom Kippur, beginning another major Arab-Israeli war.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: Camp David Accords are signed
description: Egypt and Israel, mediated by the United States, sign accords that lay the groundwork for a peace treaty.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: Egypt and Israel sign a peace treaty
description: Egypt becomes the first Arab state to make peace with Israel, leading to Israeli withdrawal from Sinai.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: First Intifada begins
description: A mass Palestinian uprising erupts in the occupied territories against Israeli rule.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: Oslo I Accord is signed
description: Israel and the PLO mutually recognize one another and agree to a framework for limited Palestinian self-government.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: Israel and Jordan sign a peace treaty
description: Jordan becomes the second Arab state to conclude a formal peace treaty with Israel.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: Second Intifada begins
description: A new wave of Israeli-Palestinian violence breaks out after a period of failed negotiations and rising tensions.
location: Israel, West Bank, and Gaza Strip

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: Israel withdraws settlers and troops from Gaza
description: Israel completes its unilateral disengagement from the Gaza Strip while maintaining control over key external access points.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Arab-Israeli Conflict
timeline_description: Major diplomatic, military, and political milestones in the Arab-Israeli conflict from the late Ottoman period to the present era.
title: Abraham Accords are signed
description: Israel signs normalization agreements with the United Arab Emirates and Bahrain in a major diplomatic shift.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: Nuclear fission is discovered
description: Otto Hahn and Fritz Strassmann identify nuclear fission, opening the scientific path to atomic weapons.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: Einstein-Szilard letter urges U.S. action
description: Albert Einstein signs a letter warning President Roosevelt that Nazi Germany might develop atomic bombs.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: Manhattan Project begins full-scale bomb development
description: The United States organizes a vast secret wartime program to build atomic weapons.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: Chicago Pile-1 achieves first controlled chain reaction
description: The first self-sustaining nuclear chain reaction demonstrates the feasibility of harnessing nuclear energy.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: Trinity test detonates the first nuclear device
description: The United States explodes the first atomic bomb in New Mexico, proving the weapon design in practice.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: Atomic bomb is dropped on Hiroshima
description: The United States uses an atomic bomb against Hiroshima in the first wartime use of a nuclear weapon.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: Atomic bomb is dropped on Nagasaki
description: A second U.S. atomic bomb devastates Nagasaki three days after the attack on Hiroshima.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: Soviet Union tests its first atomic bomb
description: The Soviet Union successfully detonates RDS-1, ending the U.S. nuclear monopoly.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: United Kingdom conducts its first nuclear test
description: Operation Hurricane makes Britain the third country to test a nuclear weapon.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: United States tests the first thermonuclear device
description: Ivy Mike demonstrates a hydrogen bomb design far more powerful than earlier fission weapons.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: Soviet Union tests a thermonuclear weapon
description: The Soviet test accelerates the superpower arms race in hydrogen bomb development.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: France conducts its first nuclear test
description: France joins the nuclear club with a test in the Algerian Sahara.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: Cuban Missile Crisis brings nuclear powers to the brink
description: The United States and Soviet Union confront each other over Soviet missiles in Cuba in the most dangerous crisis of the Cold War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: Partial Nuclear Test Ban Treaty is signed
description: The treaty bans nuclear tests in the atmosphere, outer space, and underwater.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: China tests its first nuclear weapon
description: The People's Republic of China becomes the fifth state to detonate a nuclear device.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: Nuclear Non-Proliferation Treaty opens for signature
description: The NPT establishes a global framework to limit the spread of nuclear weapons and promote disarmament and peaceful nuclear use.
source_publisher: United Nations Office for Disarmament Affairs

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: India conducts its first nuclear explosive test
description: India's test, described as a peaceful nuclear explosion, marks the emergence of another nuclear-armed state.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: INF Treaty is signed
description: The United States and Soviet Union agree to eliminate an entire class of ground-launched intermediate-range missiles.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: India and Pakistan conduct overt nuclear tests
description: A series of tests by India and Pakistan confirms a new nuclear rivalry in South Asia.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Nuclear Weapons
timeline_description: Key scientific, military, diplomatic, and arms-control milestones in the history of nuclear weapons.
title: New START treaty is signed
description: The United States and Russia sign a treaty limiting deployed strategic nuclear warheads and delivery systems.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: Parliament presents the Petition of Right
description: Parliament challenges Charles I over taxation, imprisonment, and martial law, deepening constitutional conflict.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: Charles I begins Personal Rule
description: Charles I dismisses Parliament and governs without it for more than a decade.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: Prayer book crisis sparks resistance in Scotland
description: Attempts to impose a new Anglican-style prayer book trigger widespread opposition and sharpen tensions across the Stuart kingdoms.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: First Bishops' War begins
description: Charles I moves against the Scottish Covenanters but fails to subdue them.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: Short Parliament meets and is dissolved
description: Charles I recalls Parliament for funds but dismisses it after only weeks when members press grievances.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: Long Parliament assembles
description: Parliament reconvenes and begins dismantling key elements of royal authority.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: Grand Remonstrance is adopted
description: The Commons approves a sweeping statement of complaints against the king's government.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: Charles I attempts to arrest five MPs
description: The king enters the Commons to seize leading opponents, a dramatic failure that destroys trust between crown and Parliament.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: Charles I raises the royal standard at Nottingham
description: The act is traditionally taken as the formal opening of the First English Civil War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: Battle of Edgehill is fought
description: The first major pitched battle of the war ends indecisively, showing neither side can win quickly.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: Parliamentarian forces win at Marston Moor
description: A decisive victory in northern England strengthens Parliament and the alliance with the Scots.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: New Model Army is created
description: Parliament reorganizes its armed forces into a centralized and disciplined national army.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: Battle of Naseby is fought
description: Parliament's victory at Naseby cripples the main royalist field army and turns the course of the war.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: Charles I surrenders to the Scots
description: The king gives himself up after the collapse of the royalist cause in the First Civil War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: Army seizes control of the king
description: The New Model Army takes custody of Charles I and becomes a decisive political actor.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: Battle of Preston ends the Second Civil War
description: Cromwell defeats a royalist-Scottish army, paving the way for harsher action against Charles I.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: Pride's Purge excludes many MPs
description: Army forces remove members of Parliament opposed to trying the king, leaving the Rump Parliament.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: Charles I is executed
description: The king is tried for treason and publicly executed, an unprecedented break in English monarchy.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: England is declared a Commonwealth
description: The monarchy and House of Lords are abolished and England is formally proclaimed a republic.

timeline_title: Timeline of the English Civil Wars
timeline_description: Major constitutional, political, and military events from the crises before the English Civil Wars through the Restoration.
title: Monarchy is restored under Charles II
description: The Restoration ends the revolutionary interregnum and reestablishes the Stuart monarchy.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: GNU Project is announced
description: Richard Stallman launches the GNU Project to build a free Unix-like operating system environment.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Free Software Foundation is founded
description: The Free Software Foundation is created to support the free software movement and GNU development.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Linus Torvalds announces his kernel project
description: Torvalds posts online about a hobby operating system project that would become the Linux kernel.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Linux 0.01 is released
description: The earliest public Linux source code is made available to developers.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Linux is relicensed under the GNU GPL
description: Adoption of the GNU General Public License helps align Linux with the wider free software ecosystem.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Slackware and Debian distributions appear
description: Early Linux distributions help package the kernel and GNU tools into installable systems.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Linux 1.0 is released
description: The first official stable release marks Linux's arrival as a mature network-capable operating system kernel.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Tux becomes the Linux mascot
description: The penguin mascot is adopted as a widely recognized symbol of Linux culture.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Open source movement gains momentum around Linux
description: Linux becomes central to the broader open source movement as businesses and developers embrace collaborative software.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Red Hat goes public
description: Red Hat's public offering highlights the commercial potential of Linux-based enterprise software.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Linux kernel development expands at industrial scale
description: By the early 2000s Linux development is supported by thousands of contributors and a growing number of companies.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Ubuntu 4.10 broadens Linux adoption
description: Ubuntu's first release makes Linux more accessible to mainstream desktop users.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Git is created to manage Linux kernel development
description: Linus Torvalds develops Git to support distributed version control for large-scale kernel collaboration.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Android is announced
description: Google unveils Android, a Linux-based mobile platform that would dramatically expand Linux's global footprint.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Android 1.0 reaches consumers
description: The first commercial Android release brings a Linux-based smartphone operating system to mass markets.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Linux 2.6.39 closes the 2.6 release era
description: The kernel's long 2.6 numbering sequence ends before the shift to the 3.x series.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Linux 3.0 is released
description: The kernel advances to version 3.0, reflecting a new numbering scheme rather than a radical technical break.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Linux 4.0 introduces live kernel patching support
description: Version 4.0 adds capabilities associated with updating kernels with reduced downtime.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Linux 5.4 becomes a major long-term support release
description: A widely adopted long-term release strengthens Linux's role in servers, cloud systems, and embedded devices.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Linux
timeline_description: Major development, licensing, commercial, and ecosystem milestones in the history of Linux.
title: Linux 6.0 is released
description: The kernel advances to the 6.x series as Linux continues to evolve across data center, desktop, and device ecosystems.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: First French Grand Prix is staged
description: The modern Grand Prix tradition begins in France and provides the long-term lineage for Formula One.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: Postwar Formula One rules are defined
description: Motor racing authorities establish the top-level single-seater formula that would underpin the world championship.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: First Formula One World Championship race is held
description: The inaugural world championship race takes place at Silverstone, beginning the modern F1 era.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: Giuseppe Farina becomes first world champion
description: Farina wins the inaugural drivers' title in the first Formula One championship season.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: Constructors' Championship is introduced
description: Formula One adds a title for car manufacturers, expanding the sport's competitive structure.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: New 1.5-litre engine formula begins
description: Regulatory changes reshape competition and usher in a new technical era for Grand Prix cars.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: Commercial sponsorship transforms team identities
description: Lotus adopts Gold Leaf livery, helping normalize full commercial branding in Formula One.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: Ground-effect era begins to take shape
description: Aerodynamic experimentation accelerates, changing car design and cornering performance.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: Safety Car makes its Formula One debut
description: The Safety Car is first used in the championship, though it would not become a regular feature until later decades.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: Lauda-Hunt season captivates global audiences
description: A dramatic championship battle and Niki Lauda's recovery from a near-fatal crash become one of the sport's defining narratives.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: Renault introduces the turbocharged F1 car
description: The RS01 opens the turbo era, eventually prompting a major technical shift across the grid.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: First Concorde Agreement is signed
description: Commercial and governance arrangements between teams, the FIA, and promoters stabilize Formula One's structure.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: Flat-bottomed cars are mandated
description: Ground-effect cars are curtailed by regulations designed to improve safety.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: Turbo engines are banned
description: Formula One ends the turbo era after years of escalating power and cost.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: Imola tragedies trigger safety reforms
description: The deaths of Ayrton Senna and Roland Ratzenberger lead to sweeping safety changes in Formula One.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: Cars become narrower with grooved tires
description: A major rule change reduces car width and alters tire specifications in pursuit of lower speeds.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: Singapore hosts the first night race
description: Formula One stages its first full night Grand Prix, expanding the sport's commercial spectacle.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: DRS is introduced
description: Drag reduction systems are added to help overtaking during races.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: Hybrid power-unit era begins
description: Formula One adopts V6 turbo-hybrid engines, reshaping technical priorities and competitive balance.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Formula One
timeline_description: Major sporting, technical, commercial, and safety milestones in the history of Formula One.
title: Ground-effect regulations return in new form
description: A major aerodynamic reset seeks closer racing by reshaping airflow around the cars.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: British Broadcasting Company is founded
description: A private company backed by radio manufacturers is established to organize broadcasting in Britain.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: Station 2LO begins regular broadcasts
description: The company's early London broadcasts help launch national radio service in Britain.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: BBC is reconstituted by royal charter
description: The British Broadcasting Corporation replaces the earlier company as a public corporation.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: Empire Service begins shortwave broadcasts
description: The BBC launches overseas radio broadcasting, the precursor to the World Service.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: BBC starts the world's first regular public television service
description: Regular high-definition television broadcasting begins from Alexandra Palace.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: BBC Television Service is suspended for wartime
description: Television broadcasting stops after the outbreak of the Second World War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: BBC becomes central to wartime broadcasting
description: The corporation assumes a crucial role in domestic morale and international news during the Second World War.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: Television service resumes after the war
description: The BBC restarts public television broadcasting after nearly seven years of suspension.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: Coronation of Elizabeth II is televised
description: The broadcast becomes a landmark in British television culture and accelerates TV adoption.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: ITV ends the BBC television monopoly
description: Commercial television begins in Britain, creating the BBC's first major TV competitor.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: BBC Two launches
description: The corporation adds a second television channel with a more specialized programming remit.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: BBC Two begins regular colour broadcasting
description: Colour television becomes a regular part of the BBC's service in Britain.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: BBC Radio 1 launches
description: A new popular music service is introduced in the reorganization of the BBC's national radio networks.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: Breakfast television begins with Breakfast Time
description: The BBC enters the breakfast television market with a new morning program format.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: BBC World Service Television launches
description: The BBC expands international television news alongside its long-established global radio service.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: BBC News 24 launches
description: The corporation introduces a dedicated domestic rolling television news channel.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: BBC iPlayer's technical foundations begin with online trials
description: The BBC expands on the web and prepares for on-demand digital distribution in the following decade.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: BBC iPlayer launches widely
description: The iPlayer becomes the BBC's flagship on-demand streaming platform.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: Broadcasting House redevelopment is completed
description: The BBC consolidates major news and radio operations in a modernized London headquarters.

timeline_title: Timeline of the British Broadcasting Corporation
timeline_description: Major institutional, technological, and editorial milestones in the history of the BBC.
title: BBC marks its centenary
description: The corporation reaches one hundred years since the founding of the original British Broadcasting Company.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: Bretton Woods Conference creates the IMF framework
description: Delegates agree on plans for a new postwar international monetary order centered on the IMF and World Bank.
location: Bretton Woods, New Hampshire, United States

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: IMF Articles of Agreement enter into force
description: The legal basis of the IMF becomes effective after enough countries ratify the agreement.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: IMF begins financial operations
description: The IMF starts its lending and surveillance functions in the early postwar system.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: Stand-By Arrangements are introduced
description: A new lending instrument provides members with access to IMF resources under agreed conditions.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: IMF plays a major role during the Suez crisis era
description: Financial instability linked to geopolitical crisis underscores the IMF's importance in the Bretton Woods order.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: General Arrangements to Borrow are established
description: Major economies create an additional borrowing backstop for the IMF.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: Special Drawing Rights are created
description: The IMF introduces SDRs as an international reserve asset to support the fixed exchange-rate system.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: Collapse of dollar-gold convertibility shakes Bretton Woods
description: The U.S. suspension of gold convertibility destabilizes the par value system the IMF had helped oversee.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: Major currencies begin floating
description: The Bretton Woods fixed exchange-rate order gives way to generalized floating among major currencies.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: Jamaica Accords reshape the international monetary system
description: Member countries formally revise IMF rules to reflect floating exchange rates and demonetization of gold.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: Latin American debt crisis expands IMF lending role
description: Debt emergencies push the IMF to the center of crisis management and policy conditionality.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: Enhanced Structural Adjustment Facility is created
description: The IMF expands concessional support for low-income countries.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: Brady Plan era begins
description: The IMF supports a new approach to sovereign debt restructuring after the 1980s debt crisis.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: IMF responds to the Mexican peso crisis
description: A major rescue package underscores the IMF's role in emerging-market crises.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: Asian financial crisis triggers large IMF programs
description: The IMF provides major support packages to several Asian economies amid sharp financial turmoil.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: Poverty Reduction and Growth Facility is launched
description: The IMF reframes part of its concessional work around poverty reduction strategies.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: Multilateral Debt Relief Initiative is approved
description: The IMF joins a major effort to reduce debt burdens on heavily indebted poor countries.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: Global financial crisis expands IMF activity
description: The crisis revives the IMF as a central lender and policy coordinator for a turbulent world economy.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: Large new SDR allocation is approved
description: The IMF allocates SDRs on a large scale to bolster global liquidity during the crisis aftermath.

timeline_title: Timeline of the International Monetary Fund
timeline_description: Major institutional, monetary, lending, and reform milestones in the history of the International Monetary Fund.
title: Chinese renminbi joins the SDR basket
description: The IMF adds the renminbi to the basket used to value Special Drawing Rights.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: Proposal for a European physics laboratory gains momentum
description: European scientists and policymakers push for a shared high-energy physics laboratory after the war.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: Provisional Council is established
description: European states create the framework that will become CERN.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: CERN Convention is signed
description: Twelve founding member states sign the convention that defines the organization.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: CERN is officially founded
description: The convention enters into force and CERN formally comes into being near Geneva.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: Synchrocyclotron begins operation
description: One of CERN's earliest accelerators starts delivering beams for particle physics research.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: Proton Synchrotron is inaugurated
description: The Proton Synchrotron becomes the world's highest-energy particle accelerator at the time.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: First transnational laboratory link is completed
description: A cross-border arrangement places CERN facilities on both the Swiss and French sides of the frontier.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: Intersecting Storage Rings begin operation
description: CERN brings online the first hadron collider, pioneering colliding-beam physics.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: Super Proton Synchrotron is commissioned
description: The SPS expands CERN's accelerator complex and later supports major discoveries.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: W and Z bosons are discovered
description: Experiments at the SPS confirm the weak force carriers predicted by the electroweak theory.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: Tim Berners-Lee proposes the World Wide Web
description: A CERN computing proposal lays the groundwork for the web as a global information system.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: Large Electron-Positron Collider begins operation
description: LEP opens a new high-precision era in particle physics at CERN.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: First web server and browser run at CERN
description: Berners-Lee's system becomes operational by the end of the year, proving the web concept.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: World Wide Web is opened to outside users
description: The web begins spreading beyond CERN to wider scientific and public communities.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: CERN places web technology in the public domain
description: The decision accelerates global adoption of the web without licensing barriers.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: LEP shuts down to make way for the LHC
description: CERN closes its flagship collider so the tunnel can be repurposed for the Large Hadron Collider.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: Large Hadron Collider starts up
description: The LHC begins first beam operations as the world's most powerful particle accelerator.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: LHC resumes physics operations after repairs
description: Following a 2008 incident and shutdown, the collider returns to regular data taking.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: Higgs boson discovery is announced
description: ATLAS and CMS report the discovery of a Higgs-like particle, a landmark in modern physics.

timeline_title: Timeline of CERN
timeline_description: Major institutional, accelerator, computing, and discovery milestones in the history of CERN.
title: LHC Run 3 begins
description: CERN launches a new data-taking period with upgraded detectors and accelerator systems.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: Hippocratic medicine naturalizes mental illness
description: Greek medical thought associates mental disturbance with bodily causes rather than solely supernatural ones.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: Galenic medicine shapes later views of mind and body
description: Galen's medical synthesis influences interpretations of mental disorders for many centuries.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: Bimaristans treat mental illness in the Islamic world
description: Hospitals in the medieval Islamic world include care for people with mental disorders.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: Bethlehem Hospital is founded
description: The London institution later known as Bedlam becomes one of the most famous hospitals associated with mental illness.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: Philippe Pinel reforms care at Bicetre
description: Pinel's work becomes a symbol of more humane treatment for psychiatric patients.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: York Retreat opens
description: The Quaker-run York Retreat advances moral treatment and non-coercive care for mental illness.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: Term psychiatry enters medical vocabulary
description: Johann Christian Reil helps establish psychiatry as a distinct field of healing of the mind.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: Dorothea Dix begins asylum reform campaign
description: Dix's activism leads to broad efforts to improve conditions for the mentally ill in the United States.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: Lunacy and County Asylums Acts expand state oversight in Britain
description: New laws strengthen regulation of asylums and formalize public responsibility for care.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: Kraepelin advances modern psychiatric classification
description: Emil Kraepelin's clinical work helps shape the diagnostic separation of major mental disorders.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: Freud lectures at Clark University
description: Psychoanalysis gains visibility in the United States through Freud's influential lectures.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: Uniform psychiatric statistical classification is adopted in U.S. hospitals
description: American institutions move toward standardized psychiatric diagnostic reporting.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: American Medico-Psychological Association becomes the APA
description: The professional body adopts the name American Psychiatric Association.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: Lobotomy is introduced
description: Psychosurgery emerges as a controversial intervention for severe psychiatric conditions.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: Electroconvulsive therapy is introduced
description: ECT becomes an important biological treatment, especially for severe depression and psychosis.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: DSM-I is published
description: The first Diagnostic and Statistical Manual is issued by the APA.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: Chlorpromazine inaugurates the psychopharmacology era
description: The first widely used antipsychotic drug transforms psychiatric treatment.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: Community Mental Health Act is signed in the United States
description: Federal policy encourages a shift away from long-term institutionalization toward community-based care.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: DSM-III is published
description: DSM-III introduces a more explicit, symptom-based, and standardized diagnostic framework.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Psychiatry
timeline_description: Major intellectual, institutional, diagnostic, and therapeutic milestones in the history of psychiatry.
title: DSM-5 is published
description: The latest major APA manual revision updates diagnostic categories and criteria for mental disorders.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: McDonald's is founded in San Bernardino
description: Dick and Mac McDonald open the original McDonald's Bar-B-Q restaurant.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: Speedee Service System is introduced
description: The brothers streamline operations around a limited menu and assembly-line food preparation.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: Golden Arches architecture appears
description: The now-famous arch design becomes part of the company's visual identity.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: Ray Kroc visits the San Bernardino restaurant
description: The Multimixer salesman sees the concept's expansion potential and moves to franchise it.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: Ray Kroc opens first franchised McDonald's
description: Kroc opens a restaurant in Des Plaines and formally launches McDonald's System, Inc.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: 100 million hamburgers sold milestone is reached
description: Rapid early growth demonstrates the scale of demand for the company's standardized fast-food model.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: Hamburger University is founded
description: McDonald's establishes a training institution for managers and franchise operators.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: Ray Kroc buys out the McDonald brothers
description: Kroc acquires the brothers' interest and gains full control of the business.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: Filet-O-Fish is introduced
description: The sandwich becomes one of McDonald's earliest successful product extensions.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: McDonald's goes public
description: The company lists its shares and gains access to public capital for continued expansion.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: First international restaurants open
description: McDonald's expands outside the United States with openings in Canada and Puerto Rico.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: Big Mac is introduced nationally
description: The Big Mac becomes one of the company's signature products and a global brand symbol.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: First Asian McDonald's opens in Japan
description: The Tokyo opening marks the company's major expansion into East Asia.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: First drive-thru opens
description: McDonald's opens its first drive-thru service, a format that would become central to the chain's business.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: Happy Meal launches nationally in the U.S.
description: The bundled children's meal becomes one of McDonald's most recognizable family offerings.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: Ray Kroc dies
description: The entrepreneur most associated with McDonald's global expansion dies at age 81.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: McDonald's opens in Moscow
description: The opening in the Soviet Union becomes a widely noted symbol of late Cold War economic change.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: McCafe expansion accelerates
description: The company broadens its beverage strategy through the McCafe concept.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: All-day breakfast is introduced in the United States
description: A major menu change responds to customer demand and boosts sales momentum.

timeline_title: Timeline of McDonald's
timeline_description: Major business, menu, branding, and global expansion milestones in the history of McDonald's.
title: McDonald's marks the 70th anniversary of Ray Kroc's first restaurant
description: The company commemorates seven decades since the 1955 Des Plaines opening that launched its franchised expansion.
